headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Qualcomm (QCOM) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether QUALCOMM's current share price still offers value after a strong run, the next sections will walk through what the numbers are really saying about the stock. The share price sits at US$217.77 after a mixed stretch, with the stock down 4.9% over the past week and 0.6% over the past month, yet still up 25.9% year to date and 43.1% over the last year. Recent coverage has focused on QUALCOMM's role in key technology themes and how that positions the company within...

headline: Qualcomm Drops 8% on ByteDance ASIC Deal, Marvell Falls 10% as Custom-Silicon Stocks Slide

headline: SLB Collaborates with Qualcomm on Edge AI Solutions for Energy Operations
summary: HOUSTON, June 09, 2026--Global energy technology company SLB (NYSE: SLB) today announced a memorandum of understanding with Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. to enable edge AI solutions for the energy industry, supporting real-time operational decision-making across wells, facilities and production systems.

headline: Apple, Micron, Intel, Applied Digital, Smucker, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: There’s no need for Wall Street to worry about the artificial-intelligence trade fizzling out, judging by the stocks rising on Tuesday.  Adding to investors’ AI fervor, OpenAI late Monday reported it has confidentially filed for an initial public offering one week after competitor Anthropic announced it planned to go to market.  Micron Technology  added 2% to $968.53.

headline: Nasdaq Slides as Chip Stocks Reverse Course
